hero.label: Fine Art for Real Estate
hero.headline: Your listing. Fully considered.
hero.subtext: Original hyper-local art — staged on your walls, printed for your listing, gifted to your buyer.

baseIncludes: Prints dispatched to you, ready to gift
pricing.scalesNote: Every property is different. Price scales with number of rooms, print sizes and quantities, and whether a custom collection is needed for the suburb. Get in touch with the property details and I will put a quote together.
pricing.paymentNote: 30-day invoicing on all packages. No upfront payment required.

inkOriginals.heading: Ink Originals
inkOriginals.subheading: For listings that need something beyond a print.
inkOriginals.body: Select works are available as hand-drawn ink reproductions — each one rendered by hand from the original composition using fineliners and gel pens. No two are identical. These are not prints. They are original works. Suited to prestige listings and high-end properties where the art needs to be as considered as the home itself.

process.heading: How The Work Is Made
process.body: Each work begins as an original photograph taken on location in the subject suburb. From there, every stage is handled personally — moving between digital and physical work, through colour, composition, and editing, as each piece demands. Some of it is digital. Some of it is by hand. All of it is made by the same person. The result is original art that could only have been made by someone who was actually there. For Ink Originals, the finished composition is rendered entirely using fineliners and gel pens — a process that takes a minimum of one week per piece.

about.heading: The Full Picture
about.subheading: What we do. How we do it.
